# EDUS Online Tuition

> EDUS is the quality-assured online live learning platform for school students across Sri Lanka, India, Maldives, and global markets. Live online classes, group and one-to-one tuition, expert tutors, parent updates, recordings, and learning resources. Founded 2020, based in Jaffna, Sri Lanka, serving 7,000+ students.

EDUS delivers structured online tuition aligned to the **National Syllabus** (Sri Lanka), **CBSE** (India - Tamil Nadu - Classes 6 to 10), **Cambridge IGCSE / O-Level** (Maldives - Grade 9 to 10), and **Cambridge / Edexcel / IGCSE / GCSE / O-Level / A-Level / IB** (Global one-to-one). Mediums supported: English, Tamil, Sinhala.

Contact: hello@edustutor.com - +94 70 707 2072 - No. 95, K.K.S Road, Jaffna, Sri Lanka.

## Core market pages

- [Sri Lanka Online Tuition](https://edustutor.com/sl): Grade 1 to G.C.E A/L. National Syllabus, Cambridge IGCSE, Edexcel. Sinhala, Tamil, English medium. Group classes from LKR 1,000/month; individual 1-to-1 from LKR 2,500/hour with flexible scheduling.
- [Sri Lanka Group Class Timetable 2026](https://edustutor.com/sl/timetable): Full 2026 timetable for **group classes only** (Grade 3 to G.C.E A/L, including A/L 2026, 2027, 2028 cohorts). Tamil & English medium. Days, times, tutors, monthly fees. Single LKR 1,000 one-time admission fee per student (regardless of how many classes or subjects taken). Individual one-to-one classes are NOT on this timetable - they are scheduled flexibly per student around their convenience.
- [India CBSE Online Tuition](https://edustutor.com/in): CBSE Classes 6 to 10 for Tamil Nadu students. Mathematics, Science, English in English medium. ₹2,000 admission + ₹1,000/subject/month or ₹2,500/month for all 3.
- [Maldives Cambridge IGCSE](https://edustutor.com/mv): Premium 1-to-1 Cambridge IGCSE and O-Level for Grade 9 and 10. Mathematics, English, Biology, Chemistry, Physics. From USD 18/hour.
- [Global One-to-One Online Tutoring](https://edustutor.com/global): Personalised one-to-one tutoring worldwide. Cambridge, Edexcel, IGCSE, GCSE, O-Level, A-Level, IB, and national syllabuses.

## Tutor recruitment

- [Teach with EDUS](https://edustutor.com/teach): Online tutor opportunities. Cambridge, Edexcel, CBSE, National Syllabus tutors invited to apply. Online teaching from home with structured class allocation, academic support, and performance-based recognition.

## Contact and support

- [Contact EDUS](https://edustutor.com/contact): Email hello@edustutor.com, call +94 70 707 2072, or submit an enquiry form.

## Trust and recognition

- [Accreditations & Partners](https://edustutor.com/#recognitions): EDUS is recognised by Microsoft for Startups, ICTA Sri Lanka, SLASSCOM, Hemas Slingshot x Hatch, Spiralation by ICTA, Yarl IT Hub, and Innovate Lanka.

## How classes are delivered

- **Platforms:** All EDUS classes are conducted via the EDUS Student Mobile App and the EDUS Web App, with live class sessions delivered on Google Meet. Recordings, assignments, homework, and parent updates all live inside the EDUS app ecosystem.
- **Group classes (Sri Lanka):** Fixed weekly timetable. Tamil and English medium. Grade 3 to G.C.E A/L. See https://edustutor.com/sl/timetable for the full 2026 schedule.
- **Individual one-to-one classes:** Scheduled flexibly per student. Any grade, any subject, any medium. No fixed timetable. From LKR 2,500 per hour in Sri Lanka.
- **India CBSE classes:** Fixed weekly slots, Mon-Sat. Three time slots (6:30-7:30 PM, 7:45-8:45 PM, 9:00-10:00 PM optional). 2 hours/week per subject.
- **Maldives & Global:** 1-to-1 only, scheduled around the student's time zone and tutor availability.

## Admission and fees (Sri Lanka group classes)

- **Admission fee:** LKR 1,000 per student, one time only. Paid once when joining EDUS, regardless of how many classes or subjects the student takes. Covers onboarding, account setup, and class allocation.
- **Monthly fees:** From LKR 1,000/subject/month for Primary and Grade 6-9; LKR 1,200/subject/month for O/L (Grade 10-11); LKR 2,500/subject/month for G.C.E A/L.
- **Individual 1-to-1:** From LKR 2,500/hour, all grades, all subjects, all mediums.

## Student Code (rules accepted before joining)

Every EDUS student accepts these standards before joining their first class. Strictly maintained.

1. Proper internet and device required to study.
2. Video must be turned on during class unless culturally impossible.
3. Sitting for exams and completing all assignments and homework is mandatory.
4. Students must respond to tutor queries during class. Non-respondents are removed from class.
5. Regular attendance is required. Continuous absence for 3 classes leads to removal without rejoin option.
6. Classes are conducted only via the EDUS Tutor Mobile & Web App and Google Meet.

- [Press Kit](https://edustutor.com/press): Brand logos, color palette, fact sheet, and media contact for journalists and partners.

## Blog

- [EDUS Blog](https://edustutor.com/blog): Exam preparation guides, study tips, and parent advice from the EDUS Academic Team.

### Published guides

- [Grade 5 Scholarship Exam 2026 Guide (Sri Lanka)](https://edustutor.com/blog/grade-5-scholarship-exam-2026-guide): Paper structure, 12-month preparation plan, common parent mistakes, and how online tuition fits.
- [G.C.E O/L Exam Preparation Strategy (Sri Lanka)](https://edustutor.com/blog/gce-ol-exam-preparation-strategy-sri-lanka): Subject priority for stream selection, two-year preparation plan, internal assessment importance.
- [CBSE Class 10 Mathematics Preparation Strategy (India - Tamil Nadu)](https://edustutor.com/blog/cbse-class-10-maths-tamil-nadu-prep-strategy): Topic priority by board paper weight, 16-week revision plan, what separates 95+ scorers from 85 scorers.
- [CBSE Class 9 to Class 10 Transition Guide (India)](https://edustutor.com/blog/cbse-class-9-to-class-10-transition-guide): Workload jump, subject-by-subject preparation, internal assessment, early warning signs.
- [Cambridge IGCSE Subject Choice for Maldives Students](https://edustutor.com/blog/cambridge-igcse-maldives-subject-choice-guide): Compulsory subjects, subject combinations by pathway, common mistakes, how 1-to-1 online tutoring helps.
- [Cambridge vs Edexcel IGCSE Comparison](https://edustutor.com/blog/cambridge-vs-edexcel-igcse-which-to-choose): Grading scales, paper structure, university acceptance, when each is the better choice.
- [A-Level Subject Choice Guide (International Students)](https://edustutor.com/blog/a-level-subject-choice-guide-international-students): Subject combinations by university pathway, how many A-Levels to take, common mistakes, where tutoring helps.

## Frequently asked

- **What is EDUS?** EDUS is an online education platform offering live online tuition, group classes, one-to-one tutoring, academic monitoring, recordings, and parent updates for school students.
- **Who can join?** Students from Sri Lanka, India (CBSE Tamil Nadu), Maldives, and any international location can enrol. Currently supports Grade 1 to A/L (Sri Lanka), CBSE Classes 6 to 10 (India), Grade 9 to 10 (Maldives Cambridge IGCSE), and IGCSE, GCSE, O/A-Level, IB worldwide.
- **Are classes live?** Yes. All EDUS classes are live online with trained tutors. Students interact, ask questions, and follow structured lesson plans. Recordings are provided for revision.
- **How do I enrol?** Visit https://signup.edustutor.com/ to register. Choose your region, grade, and subjects, and the EDUS academic team will follow up to confirm tutor and class plan within one business day.

- [A/L 2023 Expert Strategies - EDUS Free Seminar by Mr. S. Gourinath](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NfhDTVAKxKI): A/L 2023 exam strategy session covering study planning, paper strategy, and time management.
- [Student Mentoring - Mr. T. Sayandhan, CEO of Sunshine Medicals](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CLqRblAbyso): Mentoring session covering career guidance, motivation, and life lessons for school students.
- [G.C.E A/L SFT Paper Structure - Mr. G. Tharshanan](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SM-r9eEVp9k): G.C.E A/L Science for Technology (SFT) paper structure walkthrough by Mr. G. Tharshanan (BSc & MSc Environmental Science).
- [G.C.E A/L Combined Maths Syllabus Discussion - Tamil & English Medium](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_ebvdKOvXlY): Full syllabus discussion for G.C.E A/L Combined Mathematics in Tamil and English medium.
- [EDUS - Sri Lanka's No.1 Live Online Learning Platform](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DZOOACzljLQ): EDUS positioning as Sri Lanka's No.1 live online learning platform with quality-assured live classes.
